since_last: 29% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.04%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 29% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.21% · BTC -0.54% · Gold -1.21% · Nasdaq100 -1.20%. 29% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.04%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.04%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.72%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -9.26%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.44%, ISRG +3.28%, BIDU +2.63%, ZBRA +2.48%, INTU +2.15%. Laggards: SKHY -9.26%, SMR -8.55%, OKLO -8.47%, CEVA -7.94%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.02% at $133.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.02% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
